sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26561" key="dielkusti/nda" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διελκ-υστίνδα</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παίζειν,</foreign> <sense id="n26561.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tug-of-war,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:112" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.112</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
